scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -gt 0 } | Select-Object -Unique OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch {}; Remove-Item -Force .next\dev\*.lock -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; node server.mjs"
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -gt 0 } | Select-Object -Unique OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch {}; Remove-Item -Force .next\dev\*.lock -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
